title: Important Dates for BRABU UG Admission 2026-30

detail.title: Important Dates for BRABU UG Admission 2026-30
detail.short_info: BRABU UG Admission 2026-30 online application started on 4 May 2026. Apply for B.A., B.Sc., B.Com. (4-Year CBCS) till 25 May 2026 at umis.brabu.ac.in. Check dates, eligibility, fee & steps here.

content.text: BRABU UG Admission 2026-30 application process has started. Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University (BRABU), Muzaffarpur, has invited online applications for 4-year Undergraduate (UG) courses — B.A., B.Sc., and B.Com. under CBCS for the academic session 2026-30 in its affiliated colleges. Applications are open from 4 May 2026 to 25 May 2026 via the official UMIS portal.
Direct Link to Open BRABU UG Admission 2026-30 Official Notification PDF: Click Here
Direct Link to Apply: Click Here

rows: Babasaheb Bhimrao Ambedkar Bihar University (BRABU), Muzaffarpur
B.A., B.Sc., B.Com. (4-Year UG Programme under CBCS as per NEP 2020)

sections.heading: Important Dates for BRABU UG Admission 2026-30

content.text: For B.A. / B.Com.: Candidates who have passed Intermediate (I.A./I.Com./+2) from Bihar School Examination Board or any equivalent recognized board.
For B.Sc.: Candidates who have passed I.Sc. or +2 Science stream only from Bihar School Examination Board or equivalent recognized board.
Payment Mode: Credit Card, Debit Card, Net Banking.

sections.heading: How to Apply for BRABU UG Admission 2026-30 (Step-by-Step)

items: Visit the official BRABU website brabu.ac.in or directly go to umis.brabu.ac.in.
Click on the link for “Applications are Invited for UG (2026-2030) New Apply”.
Complete the registration by providing name, mobile number, email, and other details.
Fill the detailed application form and upload scanned documents (photo, signature, mark sheets, etc.).
Pay the application fee online.
Preview, submit, and download/print the confirmation page for future reference.

sections.heading: Documents Required for BRABU UG Admission 2026

items: Valid Email ID and Active Mobile Number
Recent Passport-size Photograph (JPEG)
Scanned Signature
Class 10th and Class 12th Mark Sheets
Aadhaar Card
Photo ID Proof (Aadhaar, Voter ID, etc.)
